step_1_image_prompt: An eye-level horizontal shot of a modern minimalist kitchen countertop. White marble countertop with subtle grey veining, light wood lower cabinets visible below the counter edge, a large window in the background letting in bright soft morning daylight. Arranged on the marble in a left-to-right lineup: a clear tall glass of water at the far left with subtle condensation, a small amber-glass dropper bottle next to it, a small white ceramic dish holding three large beige capsule supplements, then a clear empty negative space at the center of the lineup, an AG-style matte green powder canister to the right of that empty space, and a tall brushed stainless steel water bottle at the far right. The center position in the lineup is intentionally empty — clean marble surface with deliberate negative space, slightly forward of the flanking items so the eye lands there first. Bright soft morning daylight from the window behind the items, clean front-lit wash with a subtle backlight rim along the tops of each object, gentle warm glow across the marble, soft diffuse shadows cast forward toward the camera. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens at countertop level, slightly below the items. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real surface texture and grain on the marble. Clinical clean morning routine organized mood, palette of white marble, light wood, amber glass, soft greens, brushed steel.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, person in frame, hand in frame, face in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the center of the lineup, front face directly toward the camera, positioned slightly forward of the other items so it reads as the visual centerpiece. Other supplements flank it symmetrically.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box into the empty center position of the lineup, standing upright on the marble with its front face directly toward the camera, positioned slightly forward of the flanking dropper bottle and ceramic dish on the left and the green powder canister on the right, so the box reads as the visual centerpiece of the arrangement.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face, hand, or body artifact into the empty center where the product will be composited in Step 2.
